positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a nocturnal forest scene. The composition features strong, geometric silhouettes of various trees (oaks, pine, birch) against a deep twilight sky. A single, luminous crescent moon and a faint galaxy dust nebula are visible above the canopy. Incorporate stylized forest flora like glowing mushrooms and wandering fireflies, rendered with clean lines and high contrast. The overall style should be retro-vaporwave meets celestial art, utilizing a limited palette of deep indigo, teal, muted lilac, and glowing neon gold accents. Perfect central composition for apparel, vector-like clarity, clean edges, seamless repeat potential.
negative: blurry, amateur, text, logo, watermark, signature, ugly, noise, artifacts, low resolution, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, distracting, copyright
